ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bird species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the bird species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the bird species */,
  "noticeability" TEXT /* Indicator of how noticeable the species is (e.g., ** for very noticeable) */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat where the species is commonly found */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "average_lifespan" TEXT /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Primary diet of the species */,
  "migration_distance" TEXT /* Average migration distance of the species */,
  "breeding_season" TEXT /* Breeding season of the species */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration pattern entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bird species */,
  "arriving_date" TEXT /* Date when the first migrants begin arriving */,
  "rapid_influx_date" TEXT /* Date of the rapid migrant influx */,
  "peak_date" TEXT /* Peak migration date */,
  "rapid_departure_date" TEXT /* Date of rapid migrant departure */,
  "last_departure_date" TEXT /* Date when the last migrants depart */,
  "migration_route" TEXT /* Description of the typical migration route */,
  "average_speed" TEXT /* Average speed of migration */,
  "environmental_factors" TEXT /* Factors affecting migration */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the migration data */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the migration is observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_patterns_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_patterns_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES migration_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, volunteer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the observation */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species observed */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the observation took place */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the observation */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the observation was made */,
  "number_of_birds" INTEGER /* Number of birds observed */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat characteristics */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the habitat */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the habitat */,
  "threats" TEXT /* Threats to the habitat */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the migration data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes for that year */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the year */,
  "temperature_data" TEXT /* Average temperature data for the year */,
  "precipitation_data" TEXT /* Average precipitation data for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_efforts" (
  "effort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation effort */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species being conserved */,
  "effort_type" TEXT /* Type of conservation effort */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation effort */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the effort */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the effort */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the conservation effort */,
  "partners" TEXT /* Organizations or individuals partnering in the effort */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the conservation effort */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the effort is taking place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_efforts_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research focus */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the study */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the study */,
  "publications" TEXT /* List of publications resulting from the study */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* Collaborating organizations or individuals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
